status: frozen before V12 replay database creation or prediction
classification: V12 local retrieval/render over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed LongMemEval-S dev42; not fresh end-to-end, untouched, heldout, third-party, or publishable
purpose: isolate generic V12 query-relevant aggregation, local retrieval, and rendering behavior from already-paid V7 compiler output

content_review_policy.human_tuning_from_failures: allowed only as explicitly labeled consumed-development analysis and must remain generic

fixed_bindings.replay_control_schema_disclosure: The byte-frozen generic replay helper retains its historical v8-named output schema. Its operations and SHA are disclosed; the new run record supplies V12 lineage.

namespace_rules.project_name: new and used only to isolate output files
namespace_rules.run_id: exact V7 producer run ID v7m42a1
namespace_rules.prediction_files: copy none and require zero before start
namespace_rules.risk: a new run ID selects empty database scopes; a project-name change alone does not isolate database state

runtime_guards.mutations: add, finalize, and delete rejected; no update or backfill route exists
runtime_guards.search_precondition: every registered current source in the requested scope has a complete or disclosed partial job under the exact V7 fingerprint
runtime_guards.predict_only_external_network: closed proxy on port 9 with localhost exempted

retrieval_and_harness.dataset: hash-pinned local dev42 materialization; no download

execution_rules: verify the sealed source metadata and source SHA manifest before creating replay state
assert the output root and every database/cache/ledger path are absent before execution
verify every fixed input hash, the sealed V12 source metadata and SHA manifest, and the clean harness commit before copying anything
extract only the frozen V12 source and pinned harness archive
clone the V7 database with SQLite backup and never mutate the V7 producer database
run one credential-free migration/readiness backend, checkpoint it, and bind post-migration database hash and counts
probe all 42 scopes for exact-fingerprint readiness before prediction
run one full all-42 predict-only replay with no selective retry
require database counts and checkpointed database hash unchanged across prediction and no compiler cache or usage sidecar
run prediction audit from the frozen V12 runtime source
freeze all 42 predictions and 42 inherited checkpoints before any answerer or judge
preserve any failed or superseded attempt rather than overwrite it

promotion_rule.prediction_phase: exactly 42 fresh prediction files, all cutoffs present, all audit gates true, database counts and checkpointed hash unchanged, and zero model calls
promotion_rule.comparison_phase: compare latency-stripped canonical top-20, top-50, and full retrieval payloads deterministically against frozen V7 and V11 predictions before any paid evaluation
promotion_rule.evaluation_phase: requires a separately frozen paired evaluation protocol and immutable prediction copy
promotion_rule.permitted_label: V12 local retrieval/render over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed LongMemEval-S dev42
